context_text: When I grew up, I too became a wood-chopper, and after my father died I took care of my old mother as long as she lived.

context_text: But my father went there once, when I was a boy, and he said it was a long journey through a dangerous country, although nearer to the city where Oz dwells the country is beautiful.
